<!-- Phase 1 (2026-05-07): PRs are NOT being accepted yet.

If you opened this PR despite the CONTRIBUTING.md notice, it will be auto-closed
with a pointer to the doc.

If you have a fix that's blocking your work:
1. Fork this repo and apply the fix in your own fork
2. Email bloom@reaveslabs.ai with subject "agent-os feedback" + link to your fork
3. We'll review and either patch upstream or accept your fork as a contribution path when Phase 2 opens

Phase 2 (estimated v0.2, ~4-6 weeks) will accept PRs with:
- Linked issue
- Signed commits
- Test coverage
- 2 maintainer approvals
- Automated CI (lint + typecheck + secret-scan + dep-audit + CodeQL)

See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full plan.
-->
